modules.name: Information + Planning Hub Hero
modules.purpose: Position DFW Matchday Concierge as a premium public information and planning hub while keeping inquiry primary.

modules.name: Public Sponsor Rail
modules.purpose: Show sponsor-safe premium inventory below the primary CTA path.

modules.name: Dallas Match Schedule Module
modules.purpose: Provide Dallas match schedule orientation using verified public information sources.

modules.name: Airport Arrival Planning Module
modules.purpose: Guide visitors through DFW Airport and Love Field arrival planning without guaranteeing transportation fulfillment.

modules.name: Stadium Movement Module
modules.purpose: Provide stadium movement and timing guidance while live routing remains blocked unless later approved.

modules.name: Fan Festival and Public Event Guidance Module
modules.purpose: Route visitors to official-source public fan experience information and planning guidance.

modules.name: Hotel-Area Planning Module
modules.purpose: Organize visitor hotel-area orientation, nearby food, attractions, airport movement, and stadium connection planning.

modules.name: Restaurant and Watch-Party Module
modules.purpose: Create monetizable public food, bar, and watch-party guide surfaces with availability and third-party disclosure.

modules.name: Team Fan Hub Module
modules.purpose: Serve team and country fan traffic through scalable information, sponsored guide cards, referral cards, and activated planning conversion.

modules.name: Media / Corporate Public Planning Module
modules.purpose: Support coordinator-led group planning, quote preparation, schedule intake, vehicle count, equipment, luggage, and catering requests.

modules.name: Partner / Advertise Module
modules.purpose: Show sponsor and partner inventory classes, qualification fields, inquiry CTA, and claim-safe commercial language.

modules.name: Internal Inventory Control Module
modules.purpose: Track sponsor status, placement status, dates, disclosure, approval, claim review, blocked surfaces, and renewal/removal rules.
